name: create_chat_completion
description: Generate a chat completion using Groq's ultra-fast LLM inference. Send a conversation as an array of messages with roles (system, user, assistant) and receive a model-generated response. Supports temperature, max_tokens, top_p, streaming, stop sequences, and tool/function calling. Available models include llama-3.3-70b-versatile, mixtral-8x7b-32768, gemma2-9b-it, and llama-3.1-8b-instant.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The model ID to use for completion. Examples: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', 'mixtral-8x7b-32768', 'gemma2-9b-it', 'llama-3.1-8b-instant'.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.description: Array of message objects with 'role' (system, user, assistant) and 'content' (string) fields representing the conversation history.

parameters.name: temperature
parameters.description: Sampling temperature between 0 and 2. Lower values make output more deterministic. Default: 1.

parameters.name: max_tokens
parameters.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate in the response. Default varies by model.

parameters.name: top_p
parameters.description: Nucleus sampling parameter. Only tokens with cumulative probability up to top_p are considered. Default: 1.

parameters.name: stream
parameters.description: If true, returns a stream of server-sent events as tokens are generated. Default: false.

parameters.name: stop
parameters.description: Up to 4 sequences where the model will stop generating further tokens.

parameters.name: tools
parameters.description: Array of tool definitions for function calling. Each tool has a 'type' of 'function' and a 'function' object with name, description, and parameters.

messages.content: You are a helpful assistant that provides concise answers.
What are the main benefits of using Rust over C++?

message.content:
Rust offers several key advantages over C++:

1. **Memory Safety**: Rust's ownership system prevents null pointer dereferences, buffer overflows, and data races at compile time.
2. **No Undefined Behavior**: The compiler catches most classes of bugs that cause undefined behavior in C++.
3. **Modern Tooling**: Cargo provides integrated package management, building, and testing.
4. **Fearless Concurrency**: The type system ensures thread safety without runtime overhead.
